name: Fried Eggplant & Squash with Taratour
recipeIngredient: 3 medium Yellow squash, prepared the same as above
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly salt both sides of eggplant and squash slices. Place them on paper towels and cover with another layer of paper towels. Set aside for an hour to drain.
2. Pour oil to a depth of 1/4 inch in a heavy skillet and heat until hot but not smoking. Working in batches, add the eggplant and squash and fry over medium heat until golden brown. Remove from the oil and drain on paper towels. Add more oil if necessary.
3. Arrange the eggplant and squash on a serving platter and lace with taratour. Surround with pita wedges.
